settings.heading: Calgary's trusted tire shop — quality you can drive on
settings.subtitle: Serving Calgary drivers across every neighbourhood since day one. From winter tires to wheel alignments, we keep your vehicle road-ready with honest pricing and same-day service.
settings.schema_description: Prince Tires is Calgary's trusted tire shop offering tire sales, installation, wheel alignment, balancing, tire rotation, and TPMS service. Serving all Calgary neighbourhoods and surrounding areas including Airdrie, Cochrane, Okotoks, and Chestermere.

settings.heading: Built on Calgary roads, powered by honest service
settings.body:
Prince Tires started with one simple idea: Calgary drivers deserve a tire shop they can actually trust. No hidden fees, no upsells, no runaround — just straight-up expertise and fair prices on every set of tires we touch.

We've built our reputation one vehicle at a time, helping families across NE Calgary, NW Calgary, and every corner of the city stay safe through Alberta's brutal winters and everything in between. From first snowfall to spring changeover, we're the shop Calgarians call first.

Today we stock over 50 tire brands, offer same-day service on most installs, and stand behind every job with our lifetime rotation guarantee. Because when your family's on the road, corners aren't worth cutting.

settings.title: Choose your tires
settings.body: Browse our inventory online or talk to our team in-store. We'll match the right tire to your vehicle and budget.

settings.title: Book an appointment
settings.body: Same-day and next-day slots are usually available. Book online in minutes or give us a quick call.

settings.title: Drop off your vehicle
settings.body: Pull in, hand us your keys, and relax. Most installs are done in under an hour while you wait.

settings.title: Drive away confident
settings.body: Every install includes balancing, a safety inspection, and free lifetime rotations. Your vehicle, road-ready.

settings.heading: New tires in 4 easy steps
settings.subheading: From browsing to driving away — we make getting new tires as simple as possible.
settings.schema_name: How to get new tires at Prince Tires Calgary
settings.schema_description: Getting new tires at Prince Tires in Calgary is fast and simple. Same-day service available.

settings.title: Transparent pricing
settings.body: The price we quote is the price you pay. No surprise fees, no upsells — we price-match any local competitor.

settings.title: Certified technicians
settings.body: Our team has decades of combined experience fitting tires on everything from daily drivers to heavy-duty trucks.

settings.title: Same-day service
settings.body: Most installs are done the same day. Drop off your vehicle in the morning, pick it up ready to roll in the afternoon.

settings.title: Lifetime tire rotation
settings.body: Every set of tires we install comes with free lifetime rotations. Because your safety doesn't have an expiry date.

settings.title: Alberta winter experts
settings.body: We know Calgary winters. We stock the best winter tires for our climate and help you choose the right set for your vehicle.

settings.title: Road hazard protection
settings.body: Calgary roads can be rough. Our optional road hazard coverage has you covered if your new tires hit a pothole or nail.

settings.title: 4.9★ Google rating
settings.body: Over 300 verified Google reviews from real Calgary drivers — our reputation is earned one vehicle at a time.

settings.title: Conveniently located
settings.body: Easy to find and easy to access from anywhere in the city, with ample parking and fast in-and-out service.

settings.heading: The difference that keeps Calgarians coming back
settings.subheading: We built Prince Tires around the things that actually matter to Calgary drivers.

settings.heading: Proudly serving Calgary & surrounding communities
settings.subheading: Whether you're in NE, NW, SE, or SW Calgary — or driving in from Airdrie, Cochrane, or Okotoks — Prince Tires is your local tire expert.
settings.disclaimer: * Mobile tire service available in select areas. Call to confirm coverage.
settings.cta_heading: Not sure if we serve your area?
settings.cta_body: Give us a call or message — if you're anywhere near Calgary, chances are we can help.

settings.question: What tire brands does Prince Tires carry?
settings.answer: We stock over 50 tire brands including Michelin, Bridgestone, Goodyear, Continental, Pirelli, BF Goodrich, Yokohama, Hankook, General Tire, and more. Whether you need premium, mid-range, or budget tires, we have options for every vehicle and budget.

settings.question: How long does tire installation take?
settings.answer: Most standard tire installations take 45–60 minutes. This includes mounting, balancing, and a safety check. We offer same-day appointments and accept walk-ins based on availability — call ahead to confirm.

settings.question: Do you carry winter tires for Calgary winters?
settings.answer: Yes — winter tires are one of our specialties. We stock a wide selection of winter-rated tires suited to Calgary's climate, including studded and studless options. We recommend switching to winter tires when temperatures consistently drop below 7°C, which in Calgary is typically October through April.

settings.question: What areas do you serve?
settings.answer: We serve all of Calgary — NE, NW, SE, SW, and Downtown — as well as surrounding communities including Airdrie, Cochrane, Okotoks, Chestermere, Crossfield, Strathmore, and High River. Mobile tire service is available in select areas; call to confirm coverage.

settings.question: Do you offer price matching?
settings.answer: Yes. If you find a lower price on the same tire from a local Calgary competitor, bring us the quote and we'll match it. We believe the best price in Calgary should also come with the best service.

settings.question: Is an appointment required?
settings.answer: We recommend booking an appointment to guarantee your time slot, but we do accept walk-ins when space is available. Same-day and next-day appointments are usually available — book online or give us a call.

settings.question: What is included in your lifetime rotation guarantee?
settings.answer: Every set of tires we install comes with free lifetime tire rotations. Simply bring your vehicle in every 8,000–12,000 km and we'll rotate your tires at no charge for the life of the tires. This helps extend tire life and maintain even wear.

settings.question: Do you service trucks, SUVs, and commercial vehicles?
settings.answer: Yes. We service all vehicle types including sedans, crossovers, SUVs, pickup trucks, and light commercial vehicles. Let us know your vehicle year, make, and model when booking so we can confirm we have your size in stock.

settings.heading: Questions Calgary drivers ask us most
settings.subheading: Straight answers about our tires, services, and how we work.
settings.aside_body: Our team is happy to help. Give us a call or book a quick appointment.

settings.heading: Ready for new tires? Let's get you set up.
settings.subheading: Same-day appointments available. Honest pricing, certified install, and free lifetime rotations on every set.
